title: Delicate Flaky Australian Pumpkin Pie
description: A cozy Australian dish featuring the sweetness of pumpkin, the warmth of nutmeg, and a hint of smokiness, all wrapped in a delicate flaky crust, suitable for Jain-friendly diets. This pie is perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: egg replacement
ingredients.notes: such as flaxseed or chia seeds mixed with water

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, smoked paprika, nutmeg, and salt.
Add the melted vegan butter, water, and egg replacement to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Roll the dough out into a circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place the dough into a 9 inch pie dish and trim the edges to fit.
Fill the pie crust with the pumpkin puree and smooth the top.
Roll out the remaining dough to make a decorative edge, if desired.
Bake the pie for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool for 10 minutes before serving.
